title: Scaffold repository structure
description: Created client, server, shared/reference, db/liquibase, docs, scripts, and local infra structure.

title: Scaffold ASP.NET Core API
description: Created FinanceTracker.Api project, solution, config, launch settings, DI, controllers, and backend service shell.

title: Scaffold React frontend
description: Created React/Vite source tree, route shell, package metadata, Vite config, theme CSS, and API URL config for port 5273 to backend 8353.

title: Configure local services
description: Added docker-compose.local.yml and .env.example for PostgreSQL on 5438 and MinIO on 9010/9011.

title: Wire reusable auth
description: Added a development authenticated-user bridge and /api/v1/auth/me compatibility endpoint; final shared-auth module swap is tracked as FT-P2-0001.

title: Wire object storage
description: Added S3-compatible storage configuration, prefixes, abstraction, and diagnostic service using the finance local MinIO ports.

title: Add health endpoint
description: Added /api/v1/health covering API, PostgreSQL connection attempt, storage diagnostics, and storage config snapshot.

title: Create frontend route shell
description: Added dashboard, accounts, transactions, imports, subscriptions, reports, and settings routes.

title: Configure Liquibase
description: Added Liquibase properties and master changelog under db/liquibase.

title: Create core finance schema
description: Added formatted SQL Liquibase migration for accounts, transactions, transaction_splits, constraints, triggers, and indexes.

title: Create finance domain models
description: Added C# account, transaction, and split models using SqlMapper table and primary-key attributes.

title: Create account and transaction DTOs
description: Added account DTOs, transaction DTOs, split DTOs, filters, and paged result contract.

title: Create service layer skeleton
description: Added AccountService, TransactionService, TransferService, ImportService, ReportService, GuidanceService, current-user context, and health diagnostics.

title: Create frontend finance contracts
description: Added TypeScript finance contracts in client/src/types/schema.ts.

title: Create API service hooks
description: Added shared HTTP wrapper plus account and transaction service hooks.

title: Create money and date utilities
description: Added formatMoney, formatDate, toApiDate, monthRange, and calculateMonthlyRange utilities.

title: Swap development auth bridge for reusable auth
description: Replace the temporary development auth handler with the shared pipeline-template authentication module once the app is linked to that project.

title: Install Node and verify frontend build
description: Install Node/npm in this shell or run the client build from an environment where Node is available.

title: Run Liquibase against local database
description: Start local PostgreSQL and run Liquibase update to apply the Phase 2 schema.
